description: Skill router for /wf-docs. Two invocation modes — Orchestrator (no sub-command, or <slug>, --audit-only, <path>) runs the discover → audit → plan → generate → review pipeline; Primitive (/wf-docs <primitive> <args>) loads one Diátaxis reference and writes one document. 7 primitives — plan, tutorial, how-to, reference, explanation, readme, review. No sweep mode — primitives are orthogonal Diátaxis quadrants, not lenses on the same target. Invoke as /wf-docs <args>.
